## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.28

### 🎥 Camera WebRTC
- Starts the camera live-view keepalive as soon as Home Assistant opens a WebRTC session.
- Keeps the prerelease manifest version aligned so HACS/Home Assistant reports the installed build correctly.

### 🔎 Release Metadata
- Adds a release metadata check so future prereleases cannot ship with a stale manifest version.
